tool_purpose: Calculate the cell density of a biological sample based on its optical density and the experiment dilution.

calibration_factor.description: The calibration factor to adjust the density, default value is 1e9 assuming cell density is in CFU/mL.

dilution.description: The dilution factor applied during the experiment.

optical_density.description: The optical density of the sample, usually obtained from a spectrophotometer reading.

arguments.name: optical_density
arguments.description: The optical density of the sample, usually obtained from a spectrophotometer reading.

arguments.name: dilution
arguments.description: The dilution factor applied during the experiment.

arguments.name: calibration_factor
arguments.description: The calibration factor to adjust the density, default value is 1e9 assuming cell density is in CFU/mL.
